matchQuestion: How much did I spend last month?

outputPayload.narrative: You spent £9,780 last month. That is a moderate decrease versus the prior month, with most of the drop coming from lower travel and event-related costs.
outputPayload.sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS last_month_spend FROM dataset_demo_james WHERE transaction_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND transaction_date < DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
followUpSuggestions: Break last month down by category
Compare last month with the same month last year
Show weekly spending trend for last month
autoInsights: Travel and events were the largest contributors to the month-over-month decline.
